reference: If this orthopedist did not put on a cast, then consider changing doctors. Swelling is a usual symptom of a fracture. If there is displacement of bone, they can correct it under the control of an X-ray; if there are small pieces of bone inside, then surgery may be required. They should apply a cast and ice during the night or day with breaks; then, the swelling would decrease. Do not lose time.
